# Daily Report — 2026-05-21

## Task Completed
Implemented service request management tools (`list_requests`, `get_request`,
`create_request`, `update_request`) targeting the `sc_request` table. The
commented-out stub in `__init__.py` is now fully wired. Features include:
- Number-or-sys_id dual lookup with `_resolve_request_sys_id` helper
- Reference-field normalisation (requested_for, opened_by, assigned_to, assignment_group)
- Full filter set for listing: state, requested_for, assigned_to, assignment_group, approval, free-text
- Pagination metadata (has_more / next_offset) via `_paginated_list_response`
- Empty-body guard on update
- Registered in `service_desk` (list/get/create) and `full` (all four) packages

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1162 (30 new)
- Coverage: 91% total; request_tools.py 95%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Existing system-package advisories only (setuptools, urllib3, wheel, pyjwt) —
no issues in project code.

## Files Changed
- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/request_tools.py (new)
- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py
- src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py
- config/tool_packages.yaml
- tests/test_request_tools.py (new, 30 tests)

## Next Up
Add `cancel_change_request` and `reopen_change_request` lifecycle tools
to complete the change management state-transition set.
